docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
GCHOPPELAS, JUDGE; GSAYERS, CLERK; MVISCIGLIO, CSR. C/C FOR TRIAL. SETTLEMENT REACHED. TRIAL ORDERED OFF CAL.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUCK, ALVIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2555MARKET ST. #11, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $11,684.91 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,684.91, STAYED UNTIL APR-01-2000, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT PAYABLE BY INSTALLMENT BETWEEN 5/26/99 AND 4/01/00. SECURITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED. STAY CONTINGENT UPON TIMELY PAY MENTS. IF TERMS BREACHED, THEN UPON 24 HOURS NOTICE TO ATTOR NEY OF RECORD, JUDGMENT MAY BE AMENDED TO INCLUDE ALL PAST DUE RENT/DAMAGES/COSTS IN AMT. OF $5,000.
